# schemaregistry_schema (Data Source)

Fetches a schema and its metadata from the Schema Registry by subject (optionally at a specific version).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "schemaregistry_schema" "example" {
  subject = "example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `subject` (String) The subject related to the schema.

### Optional

- `compatibility` (String) The compatibility level of the subject.
- `version` (Number) The version of the schema. If omitted, the latest version is returned.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The subject of the schema.
- `references` (Attributes List) The referenced schema names list. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--references))
- `schema` (String) The schema string.
- `schema_id` (Number) The schema ID.

<a id="nestedatt--references"></a>
### Nested Schema for `references`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) The referenced schema name.
- `subject` (String) The subject related to the schema.
- `version` (Number) The version of the schema.
